name: Family Hx Diabetes — Escalate Prediabetes Alert
message: HbA1c in prediabetes range WITH family history of diabetes. Elevated risk — intensified monitoring recommended.
actionRequired: Intensified lifestyle intervention. Consider early metformin. Retest in 3 months instead of 6.
sourceAuthority: American Diabetes Association — Standards of Care in Diabetes 2024, Section 2: Diagnosis and Classification

name: Family Hx Breast Cancer — Escalate Mammogram Gap
message: Family history of breast cancer detected. Mammogram screening should begin earlier and at shorter intervals.
actionRequired: Begin annual mammography 10 years before earliest family diagnosis. Consider breast MRI per NCCN guidelines.
sourceAuthority: American Cancer Society — Breast Cancer Screening Guidelines 2023

name: Family Hx Colorectal Cancer — Escalate Colonoscopy Gap
message: Family history of colorectal cancer. Screening should begin at age 40 or 10 years before earliest family diagnosis.
actionRequired: Begin colonoscopy screening at age 40 or 10 years before youngest affected relative. Repeat every 5 years.
sourceAuthority: USPSTF — Screening for Colorectal Cancer, 2021 Recommendation Statement

name: Family Hx Hypertension — Escalate Elevated BP Alert
message: Elevated blood pressure WITH family history of hypertension. Higher risk for sustained hypertension.
actionRequired: Confirm with ambulatory monitoring. Begin lifestyle modifications immediately. Consider early pharmacotherapy.
sourceAuthority: ACC/AHA 2017 Guideline for the Prevention, Detection, Evaluation, and Management of High Blood Pressure in Adults

name: Family Hx CVD — Escalate Elevated LDL Alert
message: Elevated LDL cholesterol WITH family history of cardiovascular disease. Significant ASCVD risk enhancement.
actionRequired: Calculate enhanced 10-year ASCVD risk. Strong consideration for statin therapy. Coronary calcium scoring may be warranted.
sourceAuthority: ACC/AHA 2019 Guideline on the Primary Prevention of Cardiovascular Disease

name: Family Hx Thyroid Disorders — Escalate Borderline TSH
message: Borderline TSH WITH family history of thyroid disorders. Increased risk of progression to clinical hypothyroidism.
actionRequired: Order TPO antibodies. Retest TSH in 3 months. Monitor for clinical symptoms of hypothyroidism.
sourceAuthority: American Association of Clinical Endocrinology — 2023 Clinical Practice Guideline for Hypothyroidism

name: Family Hx CKD — Escalate Elevated Creatinine
message: Elevated creatinine WITH family history of chronic kidney disease. Higher risk of CKD progression.
actionRequired: Urgent nephrology referral. Calculate eGFR. Screen for proteinuria. Avoid nephrotoxic medications.
sourceAuthority: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of CKD

name: Family Hx Osteoporosis — DEXA Screening Recommendation
message: Family history of osteoporosis in female patient ≥50. DEXA screening recommended at earlier interval.
actionRequired: Schedule DEXA scan. Assess calcium and vitamin D intake. FRAX score calculation recommended.
sourceAuthority: International Society for Clinical Densitometry — 2023 ISCD Official Positions

name: Family Hx Sudden Cardiac Death — ECG Screening Recommendation
message: Family history of sudden cardiac death. ECG screening recommended for patient ≥30.
actionRequired: 12-lead ECG screening. Consider echocardiography. Cardiology referral if abnormalities detected.
sourceAuthority: European Society of Cardiology — 2022 Guidelines on Ventricular Arrhythmias and Prevention of Sudden Cardiac Death

name: Family Hx Type 1 Diabetes — Autoantibody Screening Recommendation
message: Family history of type 1 diabetes. Autoantibody screening recommended for patient ≥20.
actionRequired: Screen for islet autoantibodies (GAD65, IA-2, ZnT8). Consider referral to endocrinology for staging if positive.
sourceAuthority: American Diabetes Association — Standards of Care in Diabetes 2024, Section 2
